CustomField.description: AI-projected completion date calculated by NEPA_Timeline_Risk_Assessor. Based on days-in-current-stage extrapolated against the review-type statutory baseline. Labeled as a projection to distinguish it from nepa_target_completion_date__c (statutory deadline set at intake). Do not use as an authoritative deadline — for coordinator situational awareness only. Required by OMB M-24-10: AI-derived dates must be clearly distinguished from official statutory dates.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: AI projection only — not a statutory deadline. Set by Timeline Risk Assessor based on current pace.
CustomField.label: Projected Completion Date (AI)
